name: openclaw-gemini-optimized-runtime-pack
description: OpenClaw-style runtime pack using Gemini 2.5 Flash with optimized context strategy and no hardcoded API key.

apiKey.note: Set GEMINI_API_KEY or GOOGLE_API_KEY in the environment. Do not hardcode keys in this file.

notes: Gemini is used as the live backend because Qwen key is not available in the current demo.
When Qwen is available, only swap provider/model. Keep the same optimized context strategy.
